summary: OpenNori packaged Skills were redesigned from command lists into agent behavior protocols. All 10 Skill files now include trigger-oriented descriptions plus Mission, Start Here, Natural-Language Mapping, State Writes, Handoffs, User Reply Shape, and Misuse Guards; README, protocol, plugin metadata, website copy, and tests now describe and enforce this boundary.

sources.label: rg -c '^## (Mission|Start Here|Natural-Language Mapping|State Writes|Handoffs|User Reply Shape|Misuse Guards)$' plugins/opennori/skills/*/SKILL.md
sources.command: rg -c '^## (Mission|Start Here|Natural-Language Mapping|State Writes|Handoffs|User Reply Shape|Misuse Guards)$' plugins/opennori/skills/*/SKILL.md

reviewability: Inspect the packaged Skill files to verify the behavior-protocol sections and natural-language routing; inspect test/core.test.js for regression assertions; rerun npm run check, doctor, and the rg section-count command to confirm packaged Plugin Skill health.
limitations: This validates packaged Skill content, local package health, and website/README copy. A newly opened Codex session is still the correct way to observe live plugin-trigger behavior after installation.
